name: BOBCARD Scapia Credit Card
exclusions: ineligible transactions as per Scapia and BOBCARD terms
Visa rewards apply on eligible spends on select categories of minimum Rs 20
RuPay rewards apply on eligible UPI, online and offline spends of Rs 500 or more
milestoneBenefits: Unlimited domestic lounge access unlocks on monthly spends of Rs 20,000
additionalBenefits: Zero joining fee and zero annual fee
Zero forex markup on all international spends
10% rewards on offline and online spends on select categories on Visa card of minimum Rs 20
5% rewards on eligible offline, online and UPI spends on RuPay card of minimum Rs 500
20% rewards on travel bookings through the Scapia app
Unlimited domestic lounge access after spending Rs 20,000 a month
Airport privileges up to Rs 1,000

salaried: Eligibility is subject to BOBCARD and Scapia approval criteria
selfEmployed: Eligibility is subject to BOBCARD and Scapia approval criteria

name: BOBCARD ETERNA
exclusions: fuel transactions do not earn reward points
accelerated reward points are subject to monthly cap
taxes and charges excluded as per BOBCARD terms
milestoneBenefits: 10,000 bonus reward points on spending Rs 50,000 within first 60 days
20,000 bonus reward points on annual spends of Rs 5,00,000
additionalBenefits: 15 reward points per Rs 100 on travel, dining, online and international transactions
3 reward points per Rs 100 on other categories
Reward points redeemable as cashback at 1 reward point = Rs 0.25
1% fuel surcharge waiver on fuel transactions between Rs 400 and Rs 5,000, capped at Rs 250 per statement cycle
Free personal accident death cover: air Rs 1 crore, non-air Rs 10 lakh
Up to 3 lifetime free add-on cards

salaried: Resident Indian primary cardholder between 21 and 65 years
Income of Rs 12 lakh per annum or more
selfEmployed: Resident Indian primary cardholder between 21 and 65 years
Income of Rs 12 lakh per annum or more
